macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Reaches New Record High Amid Market Rally
items.summary: The S&P 500 rose 0.3% to a new record high, while the Nasdaq gained 0.4% to 24,100 and the Dow added 115 points. US stocks closed higher for a second consecutive session on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 rising 1.2% to 6,967.

items.title: Inflation Jumps to 3.3% in March Amid Oil Price Surge
items.summary: Consumer price inflation surged to 3.3% in March from 2.4% in February, driven primarily by higher energy costs from Middle East conflict disruptions. Core inflation remained stable at 2.6%.
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco

items.title: Oil Markets Remain Volatile Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: Oil prices have surged and remained volatile in response to ongoing Middle East conflict, with disruptions to Strait of Hormuz supply continuing 25 days after the Israeli-American offensive against Iran. Oil futures suggest partial recovery by Q3 2026.
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco / Coface

items.title: Major Bank Earnings Mixed; JPMorgan Down, BlackRock and Citigroup Up
items.summary: JPMorgan fell 0.7% after revising down net interest income guidance, while Wells Fargo tumbled 5.7% on disappointing results. BlackRock gained 3% and Citigroup rose 2.6% on strong earnings.

items.title: J&J Raises 2026 Revenue Outlook; American Airlines Jumps on Merger Reports
items.summary: Johnson & Johnson rebounded 0.9% higher after raising its 2026 revenue outlook. American Airlines jumped 8% following reports that United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby proposed a potential merger.

items.title: US-Iran Talks Optimism Boosts Market Sentiment
items.summary: Investor sentiment was buoyed by growing optimism that the US and Iran could soon resume talks, raising hopes for a potential agreement to end the conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Gathers Momentum Near $75K Resistance Level
items.summary: Bitcoin holds steady around $75,000, testing a key resistance at the 61.8% retracement and March highs, with market cap at $2.55T up 0.56% in 24 hours. Top performers include APT (+7.2%), AAVE (+6.4%), and IOTA (+5.2%).

items.title: Bitcoin Developer Proposal to Freeze 1.7M BTC Vulnerable to Quantum Attacks
items.summary: A Bitcoin developer group proposed BIP-361 to freeze 1.7 million BTC in obsolete P2PK addresses at risk from quantum computing threats.

items.title: Solana Stalls at Long-Term Support, Needs $105 Breakout
items.summary: Solana outperformed the market by bouncing off key support but failed to rally beyond it for two months; bulls need consolidation above $105 to target 200-week MA and prior highs.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Hits $2.55T with 1.02% Gain, Tied to Stock Rally
items.summary: Cryptocurrency market capitalization reaches $2.55T, up 1.02% in 24 hours, showing 75% correlation with S&P 500 amid US stock highs and geopolitical ceasefires.

items.title: Kraken Expert Predicts Bitcoin to $80K on Middle East De-escalation and Earnings
items.summary: Bitcoin up 0.7% to $75,116 in 24 hours after 12% two-week rally; Kraken VP sees $80K breakout if Middle East conflict eases and US corporate earnings remain strong.

items.title: Charles Schwab Announces Cryptocurrency Trading Launch
items.summary: Charles Schwab plans to launch crypto trading for clients after missing revenue expectations, amid broader market shifts bridging traditional finance and digital assets.

items.title: DeXe Leads Gainers with 20% Surge, RaveDAO Down 32%
items.summary: Top 24-hour gainers: DeXe (+20.12%), Siren (+13.98%), Aave (+5.97%); biggest losers: RaveDAO (-32.55%), JUST (-12.71%).

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Concerns Mount Over Anthropic's Powerful New Mythos AI Model
items.summary: Experts warn that Anthropic's Mythos AI model, designed to detect software security flaws, is too powerful for public release and risks falling into the wrong hands. Former AI CEO Matt Shumer discussed the emerging concerns on CBS News.

items.title: Cybersecurity Firm Demonstrates Hackers' Use of AI to Breach Networks
items.summary: A cybersecurity firm showcased how hackers are leveraging AI for network breaches amid U.S. warnings of Iranian cyberattacks and FBI reports of $21 billion in cybercrime losses last year.

items.title: New Trailer Features AI-Generated Val Kilmer After His Death
items.summary: The trailer for 'As Deep as the Grave' includes an AI-generated version of Val Kilmer, who died in 2025, with approval from his children for the long-planned project.

items.title: Israeli Military Admits Using AI-Generated Photo of Killed Lebanese Journalist
items.summary: The IDF admitted to posting a photoshopped, AI-generated image of journalist Ali Shoeib in Hezbollah uniform to portray him as a terrorist, following criticism from the Foreign Press Association.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Battlefield 6 Reveals 2026 Roadmap with New Maps, Naval Warfare, and Proximity Chat
items.summary: Battlefield 6 announced a detailed 2026 roadmap including Seasons 3, 4, and 5 with 7 new maps, naval warfare features, and proximity chat. The update outlines major content drops through the end of the year.

items.title: PlayStation Plus April 2026 Game Catalog Revealed as Disappointing Lineup
items.summary: The PS Plus Game Catalog for April 2026 includes The Crew Motorfest, Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered, Football Manager 26, Console Warriors, Abyss, and more, drawing criticism for being underwhelming.

items.title: Major Nintendo Switch 2 Leaks: Starfield, DMC5, Diablo, and Multiple Remakes Rumored
items.summary: New leaks suggest Nintendo Switch 2 will feature big AAA titles like Starfield, Devil May Cry 5, Diablo, Resident Evil remakes, Guardians of the Galaxy, and potential Ocarina of Time and Super Metroid remakes.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Updates: Super Earth Error Fixed, Sentry and FRV Nerfs Discovered
items.summary: Arrowhead Game Studios fixed a Super Earth error and updated known issues in Helldivers 2, while players found nerfs to FRV and Sentry stratagems. Sony also filed a patent for a new PlayStation controller concept.

items.title: League of Legends Patch Brings Perfect Comet Rework and Dark Harvest Changes
items.summary: The latest League of Legends update features a highly praised Comet rework following Deathfire Touch release, with Dark Harvest reportedly nerfed significantly.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Full-Stack Silicon Quantum Computer
items.summary: Quantum Motion has achieved a milestone by deploying the first full-stack quantum computer using standard silicon chip fabrication, potentially accelerating scalable quantum systems.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs into Mainstream
items.summary: Google and Qualcomm are advancing Android PCs to challenge Microsoft and Apple, aiming to scale the mobile OS to desktops and reshape personal computing.

items.title: Amazon Faces Class-Action Lawsuit Over 'Bricking' Fire TV Sticks
items.summary: A class-action suit accuses Amazon of intentionally disabling early Fire TV streaming sticks to force upgrades, drawing significant customer backlash.

items.title: YouTube Introduces Option to Turn Off Shorts Entirely
items.summary: YouTube now allows users to disable Shorts completely on mobile devices, addressing user preferences for a customized viewing experience.

items.title: iPad Air Reportedly Switching to OLED Displays Next Year
items.summary: Sources claim the iPad Air will upgrade to OLED screens, potentially marking one of its biggest enhancements, though another iPad model might launch it first.

items.title: Samsung Expands Galaxy A55 One UI 8.5 Beta Program
items.summary: The One UI 8.5 beta for Galaxy A55 is now live in more countries, bringing features originally planned for Galaxy S26 to older devices like S24.
